title: stachys glandulosissima
intro: Stachys glandulosissima, also known as glandular hedgenettle or sticky hedge nettle, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its essential oils and bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Stachys glandulosissima include soothing digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and exhibiting antimicrobial activity against various pathogens. Herbal preparations of this plant are often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
